target: 4. Where Is the Time Capsule?
So, where did we bury the time capsule?
Ah, about that. Shinpei, listen closely.
Y-Yeah.
Where did we bury it again?
Hah!? Then where the heck were you walking towards!?
Ahaha, I thought if I just started walking, I might remember something.
Sis always acts before she thinks, huh.
So, we're currently looking for information. Shinpei, do you remember anything?
Hmm...? I had pretty much forgotten about the time capsule itself, so...
What about Mio?
I remember putting something in it with Sis, but beyond that...
What about Kaori-chan?
I'm sorry. I don't remember anything either...
Is that so? The only other people we could ask are...
Sou and Toki-chan! Those two should have been there too.
Should we try calling them? I don't know if they'll remember, though.
Yeah, let's give them a call!
Hello, Sou? It's me, Ushio. Hey, I wanted to ask you something.
We buried a time capsule back in elementary school, right? I'm thinking of digging it up, but I can't remember where it is.
Do you remember anything, Sou? Yeah, yeah...
Oh, is that so? Then Toki-chan too?
...Yeah, got it. See ya later.
H-How was it...?
Ah, he didn't remember a thing. He said Toki-chan didn't know the location either.
Phew…
...What should we do?
I... just remembered something. Wasn't it you who buried it, Sis?
…Huh?
Ah... come to think of it. I'm pretty sure Kofune-san said she was going alone that time...
Ah, I remember now!
You said that if everyone knew, someone might dig it up, so you went to bury it alone, Ushio.
Was that how it was?
*Sigh*, seriously, Sis...
What are we supposed to do if the person who did it forgot?
I guess so. Now that you mention it, I feel like I might have buried it alone...
...Ah, I'm starting to remember! There should definitely be a memo. A memo where I wrote down the location where I buried it!
That's me for you. I don't miss a thing.
Alright! Now that we know that, I'm going home to look for that memo!
Ah, she's running off on her own again...!
Wait, Sis!
Phew…
Well then, Koyuba-san. Shall we get going too?
Y-yeah…
